evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Translate business needs into scalable, well-governed data solutions; Improve data quality, reliability, performance and cost efficiency; DevOps practices including testing and CI/CD; compliance with architecture, security and access standards
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour: governance, quality, reliability, compliance, and DevOps testing dominate; no velocity language.
evidence.domain_risk: global seed/agricultural company; data quality and reliability concern; no financial/regulatory signal
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Moderate: enterprise data infrastructure role without explicit financial/regulatory consequence; operational reliability concern secondary.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Design, develop and maintain advanced data models; empower self-service BI; coach colleagues; knowledge sharing; user enablement and adoption
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mature: self-service BI, mentoring, adoption programs, and established data products signal mature, established function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design, develop and maintain advanced data models and analytics products; Lead complex analytics and reporting initiatives; Translate business needs into scalable, well-governed data solutions; Coach colleagues; Contribute to knowledge sharing
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager: strategic ownership of analytics products, complex initiatives, governance, and team development shows domain expertise.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: data platform infrastructure; self-service BI; stakeholder management; decision-making enablement
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal data: role focuses on data platform and self-service infrastructure for analytics consumers.
evidence.autonomy_level: Design; Develop and maintain; Lead complex initiatives; Translate business needs; Coach and guide teams; Strategic yet pragmatic
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic: candidate leads complex analytics initiatives, translates business strategy into data solutions, coaches teams, and drives adoption.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or expected AI capability.
evidence.testing_framing: testing and CI/CD for data products; Improve data quality, reliability
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Responsibility: testing and quality ownership framed as core practice within CI/CD framework.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Improve data quality, reliability, performance and cost efficiency; compliance with architecture, security and access standards
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: quality, reliability, and compliance concern secondary to analytics enablement and business translation.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design, develop and maintain advanced data models; Improve data quality, reliability, performance and cost efficiency; Lead initiatives
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: advancing and optimizing established analytics infrastructure across global organization.
evidence.language_gate: Dutch and English required (professional proficiency implied by Master's + 6-8 years)
evidence.loss_aversion: Improve data quality, reliability, performance and cost efficiency through lifecycle management. Ensure compliance with architecture, security and access standards.
